title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2 ***.] (3) It shall come into force on such date3 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 25 of 1968, s. 3 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 15-8-1968). 3. 1st July, 1949, vide Notification No. I OA (4)/49, dated 1st June, 1949, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i)
